issues.message: This parameter is unused.
Don't use '{}' as a type.
Avoid classes that contain only static members.

.map()/.filter()/.forEach() called without optional chaining — verify non-null

onClick handler without a paired onKeyDown/onKeyPress — keyboard users cannot trigger this action
Hardcoded hex color in style prop — use a design token or CSS variable for consistency and theming
Error/success state may be communicated by color alone — add an icon, text label, or aria-label (WCAG 1.4.1)
Inline color style= on JSX element — extract to CSS module or design token to support high-contrast mode
